NAME

fnv1a.h - #️⃣ FNV-1a Hash Function Implementation

SYNOPSIS

Macros


#define FNV1A_32_OFFSET_BASIS 2166136261ULL
FNV-1a 32-bit offset basis. #define FNV1A_32_PRIME 16777619ULL
FNV-1a 32-bit prime. #define FNV1A_32_MASK 0xFFFFFFFFULL
FNV-1a 32-bit mask. #define FNV1A_INIT(hash)
FNV-1a 32-bit hash macro. #define FNV1A_32_HASH(hash, byte)
FNV-1a 32-bit hash macro for a single byte.
